metric_policy: EAAI-aligned enhancement baseline plus existing Stage1 diagnostic metrics

sift_match.definition: raw-enhanced grayscale OpenCV SIFT matching with Lowe ratio test
sift_match.raw_anchor_policy: raw SIFT_MATCH_RATIO is NA and is excluded from SIFT_MATCH ranking

sseq.reference: Liu et al. 2014, No-reference image quality assessment based on spatial and spectral entropies
sseq.note: The original SSEQ release also uses a learned quality predictor. This script extracts SSEQ-style spatial/spectral entropy features and reports the mean of spatial/spectral entropy means across three scales as a transparent scalar. It is not claimed to be the EAAI authors' private code.
